frozen_scope.source: The exact 55 static basket elites replayed in Phase 0 and Phase 1.

multiplicity_retro_estimate.method: Conservative upper-bound reconstruction from persistent counters and immutable V6 artifacts; overlapping layers are intentionally counted again, then the subtotal is multiplied by two for incompletely atomized historical tests.
multiplicity_retro_estimate.anti_under_count_rule: The counter may increase after this run when additional forgotten historical tests are proven, but may never decrease. Any increase invalidates no rejection; it can only make future promotion harder.
multiplicity_retro_estimate.CONTRE: The historical pipeline did not atomically count every statistical comparison, so 246,706 is a conservative reconstruction rather than an exact census; the factor two limits but cannot prove absence of under-counting.

daily_account_path.construction: Replay each frozen static basket once over the full ordered development session-day range as one merged shared account, with target and MLL terminal barriers disabled only for return-vector construction; preserve actual component conflicts, fixed quantities, costs and chronological event paths.
daily_account_path.calendar: America/Chicago Topstep session day (17:00 CT open, 16:00 CT winning-day lock).
daily_account_path.missing_activity_day: Zero daily PnL on an eligible common session day with no accepted event.

behavioral_clustering.input: Aligned full-development daily net PnL vectors under frozen base costs.
behavioral_clustering.correlation: Pearson correlation with pairwise complete observations; two zero-variance vectors receive rho=1 only if exactly equal, otherwise rho=0.
behavioral_clustering.deterministic_cluster_ids: Sort clusters by the lexicographically smallest policy_id; members sorted lexicographically.
behavioral_clustering.selection_cap: At most one headline representative per cluster.

cost_and_sim_exploit_policy.stress_1_5x: Multiply the complete frozen round-turn cost of every trade by 1.5 without changing signals or fills.
cost_and_sim_exploit_policy.stress_2x: Multiply the complete frozen round-turn cost of every trade by 2.0 without changing signals or fills.
cost_and_sim_exploit_policy.SIM_EXPLOIT: If pooled full-development net expectancy per accepted trade is <= 0 under 2x cost, assign irreversible SIM_EXPLOIT and kill the exact candidate.
cost_and_sim_exploit_policy.promotion_cost_gate: Pooled purged walk-forward net expectancy per accepted trade must be > 0 under 1.5x cost.

walk_forward.fold_definition: Split the ordered common Chicago session days into four contiguous arrays using numpy.array_split; no data-dependent boundary changes.
walk_forward.strategy_retraining: None. Frozen strategies and baskets are replayed unchanged.
walk_forward.purge: For each candidate, remove from each fold any event whose entry precedes the fold but whose frozen exit reaches into it; purge length therefore equals the exact label/holding horizon.
walk_forward.embargo: Remove the first five eligible Chicago session days of every fold after the first.
walk_forward.primary_expectancy: Sum net PnL under 1.5x cost over all retained fold events divided by their total count.
walk_forward.weak_fold_policy: A weak fold is diagnostic, not fatal, provided pooled expectancy remains positive; every fold result is published.

deflated_sharpe.expected_max_sharpe: E[max SR] = std_SR*((1-gamma)*Phi^-1(1-1/N_trials)+gamma*Phi^-1(1-1/(N_trials*e))) with gamma=0.5772156649015329, mean null Sharpe 0, and std_SR=1/sqrt(n-1).

multiple_testing.p_value: One-sided p=1-Phi(deflated_z), using the same deflated-z statistic frozen above.
multiple_testing.ties: Stable sort by p_value then policy_id.
multiple_testing.promotion_gate: Candidate must be rejected by BH at q=0.10 in addition to deflated_z>0.

compliance.trajectory_gate: 100% deterministic compliance with every executable R1-R16 trajectory constraint under the frozen implementation, including both R2 modes as reported sensitivity, R3 on/off diagnostics, R4, R5 and R16.
compliance.ticket_boundary: R2, R6 and R11 provenance remain CONFLICT/ASSUMED and block deployment tickets, but do not prevent research classification.

ranking: higher 1.5x pooled walk-forward expectancy per trade
promotion.if_none_survive: Return a clean null and reserve all five shadow slots for Track B after Gate G1 remains green.
promotion.candidate_fiches: Representative candidate fiches are separate WORM commits created only after selection and before any gap ingestion.

honest_green_statement: Every counter component, DSR formula, BH family, clustering cutoff, stress threshold, fold rule and selection ranking is frozen before daily PnL vectors or candidate Phase 2 statistics are computed.
